findings.message: push_state_to_ha never calls raise_for_status(); HA 401/403/500 responses silently accepted, entities stay missing/stale.
segment_type not forced to 'off' when session_stopped=True; heartbeat can push stale segment type inconsistent with idle media_player state.
No serialization between concurrent push tasks; slow transition push can overwrite stop push. Acceptable for v1 — heartbeat corrects within 30s.
Heartbeat task dereferenced — addressed with del pattern and event loop ownership note.
